title: Auto Workstations
description: Fabric mod for auto crafting, enchanting, anvil operations, brewing, and more!
body:
![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/title.png)

[![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/discord.png)](https://discord.gg/xQke7DpYMT)

  
  

Auto Workstations adds automated versions for many of the vanilla workstations, including:

*   Crafting Table
*   Furnace
*   Enchanting Table
*   Brewing Stand
*   Grindstone

Although some of these may already seem automatable, such as the furnace, this mod allows the automation of XP collection from them.  
Each auto workstation in the mod has an iron and gold version, with the gold version being faster.

  
  
Currently looking for developers to help out with the mod! Please join the Discord and drop a message if interested.  
  

![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/autoCraftinTableTitle.png)  
  
![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/autoCraftingTable1.gif)

  
  

![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/autoFurnaceTitle.png)  
  
Auto Furnaces allows the automated extraction of XP. Empty glass bottles can be inserted, and they will be filled with XP to product bottles o' enchanting.  
  
![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/autoFurnace1.gif)

  
  

![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/autoEnchantingTableTitle.png)  
  
Auto Enchanting Tables can store XP, this works like a player's XP bar where each level takes longer to fill then the last. Bottles o' enchanting can be inserted and emptied into these and will output empty glass bottles.  
  
![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/autoEnchantingTable1.gif)

  
  

![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/autoExperienceOrbVacuumTitle.png)  
  
This block can suck up nearby XP orbs and bottle them up like the Auto Furnace. The gold version has a larger range than the iron one.  
  
![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/autoExperienceOrbVacuum1.gif)  
  
![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/autoExperienceOrbVacuum2.gif)

  
  

![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/autoAnvilTitle.png)  
  
Auto Anvils can store XP, this works like a player's XP bar where each level takes longer to fill then the last. Bottles o' enchanting can be inserted and emptied into these and will output empty glass bottles.  
  
![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/autoAnvil1.gif)  
  
![](https://files.cablepost.co.uk/images/mc/mods/autoWorkstations/autoAnvil2.gif)

  
  
  
  

Hoppers can be attached to these to allow complete automation.  
  
Other automated workstations are also planned:

*   Smiting table

This mod is in beta, if you find an issue please contact me on discord via [my Discord server](https://discord.gg/xQke7DpYMT) or by emailing [billyg270@gmail.com](mailto:billyg270@gmail.com)  
  
The conveyor belts shown in some GIFs are from: [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/conveyor-belts-fabric)
